_comment: Contract-B strict-verify cross-language acceptance vectors. The Go verifier (vaultmind-oss internal/identity.VerifyCanonical) and the Rust verifier (agent-chat chat-core contractb, ed25519-dalek verify_strict) MUST produce the listed verdict for each vector. 'accept' = (true,nil). 'reject' = structural reject (Go: false + non-nil error). Generated from a fixed seed; the small_order_R vector is the one ZIP-215 wrongly accepts.

vectors.name: valid
vectors.note: honest RFC-8032 signature; both verifiers ACCEPT

vectors.name: small_order_A_allzero
vectors.note: all-zero pubkey + all-zero sig (universal-forgery vector); reject as small-order A

vectors.name: small_order_R_identity
vectors.note: R=identity, S=a*k: satisfies the COFACTORED eq (ZIP-215 accepts) but reject as small-order R

vectors.name: non_canonical_R
vectors.note: R encoded as y=p+3 (non-canonical); reject (byte-compare, not point-compare)
